schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

mainEntity.name: How much does startup valuation cost in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pre-revenue: from \u20b925,000. Growth-stage DCF: from \u20b950,000. Multi-framework (FEMA + IT + 409A): from \u20b91,00,000. Fixed-fee quotes after free consultation. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: How long does startup valuation take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standard: 5-7 working days from data receipt. Express: 2-3 days. Pre-revenue valuations are typically faster (3-5 days) as they require less financial data.

mainEntity.name: Can you value a company with no revenue?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We specialise in pre-revenue valuations using Berkus, Scorecard, Venture Capital, and Revenue Ramp Bayesian methods. These are designed for companies where traditional DCF is unreliable.

mainEntity.name: Is FEMA valuation needed if my angel investor is an NRI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Depends. NRI investment on repatriation basis = FDI = FEMA compliance required. NRI investment on non-repatriation basis = simplified route. We assess and advise.

Our published research at virtualauditor.in/learn/the-valuation-paradox/ concluding that 90% of Indian startup valuations are statistically indefensible. Uses Monte Carlo simulation, Jarque-Bera testing, and Bootstrap confidence intervals to demonstrate the gap between industry practice and statistical rigour.
